Bash(git add .env.local.example .eslintrc.json .gitignore .nvmrc .prettierrc CHANGELOG.md README.md app/ components/ lib/ middleware.ts next.config.mjs package-lock.json package.json postcss.config.mjs public/ scripts/ tailwind.config.ts tsconfig.json types/)

Initial scaffold of Forte AI Solutions marketing site

Next.js 14 with TypeScript strict mode, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
Includes all pages, components, API routes, brand identity system, SEO,
security headers, analytics, and build-time llms.txt generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(gh repo create forte-ai-site --public --source=. --push --description "Marketing site for Forte AI Solutions. Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS." 2>&1)
Bash(cd ~/forte-trading && python3 -m pytest tests/test_signals.py tests/test_risk.py tests/test_paper_trader.py -v 2>&1 | tee test_results.txt)

Bash(cd ~/forte-trading && python3 -c "
import asyncio, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

async def seed\(\):
    from data.scrapers.github_scraper import fetch_commit_velocity
    from data.scrapers.alt_data import fetch_fear_greed, fetch_coingecko_trending
    from data.pipelines.crypto_feed import fetch_mock_price
    from data.pipelines.prediction_markets import fetch_prediction_market_data
    from db.connection import write_to_db
    from config.settings import TRACKED_ASSETS, GITHUB_REPOS

    print\('Seeding price data...'\)
    for asset in TRACKED_ASSETS:
        for _ in range\(5\):
            data = await fetch_mock_price\(asset\)
            await write_to_db\('price_feeds', data\)

    print\('Seeding GitHub data...'\)
    for repo in GITHUB_REPOS:
        data = await fetch_commit_velocity\(repo\)
        await write_to_db\('scrape_data', data\)

    print\('Seeding alt data...'\)
    fg = await fetch_fear_greed\(\)
    await write_to_db\('scrape_data', fg\)
    cg = await fetch_coingecko_trending\(\)
    await write_to_db\('scrape_data', cg\)

    print\('Seeding prediction markets...'\)
    markets = await fetch_prediction_market_data\(\)
    for m in markets:
        await write_to_db\('price_feeds', m\)

    print\('Seed complete.'\)

asyncio.run\(seed\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd ~/forte-trading && docker exec forte_db psql -U forte -d forte_trading -c "SELECT 'price_feeds' as tbl, COUNT\(*\) FROM price_feeds UNION ALL SELECT 'signals', COUNT\(*\) FROM signals UNION ALL SELECT 'trades', COUNT\(*\) FROM trades UNION ALL SELECT 'scrape_data', COUNT\(*\) FROM scrape_data UNION ALL SELECT 'portfolio_history', COUNT\(*\) FROM portfolio_history UNION ALL SELECT 'risk_log', COUNT\(*\) FROM risk_log;")
